behaviors.description: `=SUM(A1:A10)` returns the correct sum for cells A1..A10.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at parser/range-resolver/function-dispatch handoff, not just SUM math. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) call SUM(values) directly; catches arithmetic bug, misses A1:A10 parsing/range expansion bug. Current(Integration) evaluate workbook formula with populated A1..A10; catches off-by-one range resolution and dispatcher bugs. High(System) run through CLI/file path; catches packaging/runtime wiring but not required by behavior text. Rejection-gate: System rejected because behavior text only states in-engine evaluation, not disk/process/HTTP.
behaviors.test_description: Build an in-memory workbook, set A1..A10 numeric values, set target cell to `=SUM(A1:A10)`, run evaluator, assert exact numeric result and that range endpoints are included.

behaviors.description: Formula chaining across cells (e.g., `B1=A1*2`, `C1=B1+1`) produces correct cascaded result.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug appears when reference resolution and formula evaluation interact across cells. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network needed. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) test `evalAdd(evalMul(x,2),1)`; catches arithmetic/order bug, misses cell-graph lookup bug. Current(Integration) workbook with A1/B1/C1 formulas; catches stale/intermediate dependency resolution failures. High(System) full app invocation; unnecessary for this failure boundary. Rejection-gate: System disqualified because behavior text is purely in-memory cell evaluation.
behaviors.test_description: Create workbook cells A1=5, B1=`=A1*2`, C1=`=B1+1`; evaluate C1 and assert 11, plus assert B1 computed as 10 in same pass.

behaviors.description: Circular dependency (`A1->B1->A1`) is detected and returns circular-reference error.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: cycle detection failure occurs at dependency-graph traversal across cells/modules. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) test graph cycle helper on synthetic nodes; catches pure algorithm bug, misses formula-reference graph construction bug. Current(Integration) real formulas in workbook; catches missed cycle from parser/resolver mismatch. High(System) end-to-end process adds no required signal. Rejection-gate: System rejected because no real infrastructure dependency is stated.
behaviors.test_description: Set A1=`=B1+1` and B1=`=A1+1`; evaluate either cell and assert explicit circular-reference error code, not timeout/stack overflow.

behaviors.description: `VLOOKUP` exact match returns correct value; missing key returns lookup error.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: exact-match semantics plus table-range extraction/error propagation cross function library and reference resolver. REAL-INFRA: no external infra needed. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) invoke VLOOKUP(table,key); catches match logic bug, misses range extraction/type-coercion from cells. Current(Integration) evaluate real formula over worksheet table; catches wrong-column/range-binding and error-token mapping bugs. High(System) process/file roundtrip unnecessary for behavior. Rejection-gate: System rejected because behavior text is formula evaluation only.
behaviors.test_description: Populate lookup table cells, evaluate one formula with present key and one with absent key, assert matched value for first and canonical not-found error for second.

behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: nested expression parsing + conditional evaluation + type comparison can fail at module boundaries. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) evaluate prebuilt AST for nested IF; catches branch logic bug, misses parser precedence/parenthesis bug. Current(Integration) parse and evaluate formula string with varying A1 values; catches parser-dispatch and branch-eval defects. High(System) adds no required coverage for stated failure mode. Rejection-gate: System rejected since behavior excludes real infra dependencies.
behaviors.test_description: Run three subcases with A1=25,15,5 against `=IF(A1>10, IF(A1>20, "high", "medium"), "low")`; assert outputs `high`,`medium`,`low`.

behaviors.description: `CONCATENATE` joins cell values with separator and skips empty cells.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure can occur when empty-cell representation from grid layer is interpreted by function layer (empty vs blank string). REAL-INFRA: none. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) call concatenate(args) with explicit empties; catches join logic bug, misses cell-value normalization bug. Current(Integration) evaluate formula referencing actual empty cells; catches empty-cell coercion/skip policy defects. High(System) unnecessary for this boundary. Rejection-gate: System rejected because behavior text concerns in-engine evaluation semantics only.
behaviors.test_description: Set cells with values and empties, evaluate CONCATENATE formula using separator, assert output omits separators for empty references per skip rule.

behaviors.description: Cross-sheet reference (`=Sheet2!A1+1`) resolves when referenced sheet exists.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug appears at workbook/sheet namespace resolution handoff, not a single function only. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) resolveSheetCell("Sheet2","A1") helper; catches resolver bug, misses parser tokenization/integration bug. Current(Integration) multi-sheet workbook formula eval; catches wrong sheet binding and reference scope bugs. High(System) app-level run unnecessary. Rejection-gate: System rejected because behavior text does not require disk/process/network.
behaviors.test_description: Create Sheet1 and Sheet2, set Sheet2!A1=7, set Sheet1 formula `=Sheet2!A1+1`, evaluate and assert 8.

behaviors.description: On referenced-cell change, dependents recalculate in correct topological order.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: core failure is dependency graph update + scheduler/executor interaction after mutation. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) test topological sort function only; catches ordering algorithm bug, misses incremental graph update bugs. Current(Integration) mutate source cell in workbook with dependency chain/diamond; catches stale cache, wrong recompute order, partial propagation. High(System) no additional required boundary per behavior text. Rejection-gate: System rejected since recalculation requirement is internal engine behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Construct dependency graph (e.g., A1->B1,C1->D1), evaluate once, mutate A1, trigger recalculation, assert final dependent values and (if observable) recompute order respects topological constraints.

behaviors.description: Undo after formula edit restores formula text and previously computed dependent values.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure boundary is history manager + formula store + recalculation state handoff. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess needed. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) test undo stack push/pop; catches history bug, misses recomputation restoration bug. Current(Integration) edit formula then undo in workbook and verify dependents; catches state rollback propagation defects. High(System) UI/process-level test unnecessary for behavior as written. Rejection-gate: System rejected because behavior specifies engine undo semantics, not external process/OS interaction.
behaviors.test_description: Set baseline formulas and computed dependents, edit one formula to change outputs, invoke undo, assert original formula string restored and all dependent cell values return to pre-edit values.

behaviors.description: Save workbook to disk and load back with identical formulas/values, including floating-point precision.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA: behavior explicitly requires disk persistence and reload through real file I/O boundary. MOCK-HIDE: in-memory serializer tests can miss file-mode/truncation/encoding/write-read path issues. LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none. Candidate tests: Low(Unit) serialize/deserialize byte buffer functions; catches codec bug, misses file I/O path bugs. Current(System) write to temp real file then reload via normal API; catches binary persistence + filesystem interaction failures and precision drift. High(Workflow) not applicable; no multi-agentic pipeline. Rejection-gate: Integration rejected because behavior text says "to disk and loading it back" and precision invariance across persisted artifact.
behaviors.test_description: Create workbook with representative formulas and high-precision floats, save via production save API to temp disk file, reload via production load API, assert exact formula text equality and numeric equality under defined precision policy.
